project.name: Dummy.Lab
project.author: Tom Stryhn
project.description: Hyper-V lab automation platform. Composable PowerShell cmdlets for building, inspecting, and monitoring isolated Windows Server AD lab environments.

entry_points.description: Bootstrap installer. Downloads from GitHub (or uses LocalSource), validates prerequisites, extracts the project, runs the module build, prints next steps.
In-terminal cheat-sheet printer. Prints the exact DummyLab cmdlet commands for common workflows. Does not execute lab operations.
Assembles Scripts/src/DummyLab/ source files into Scripts/Modules/DummyLab/ (single module).

module.name: DummyLab
module.description: Single module. 51 public cmdlets covering configuration, state, network, storage, host preflight, VM lifecycle, guest execution, golden images, composition, and observability.

layout.DummyLab.psd1: Module manifest (source copy, copied to built output).
layout.Public/: Exported cmdlets. One function per file.
layout.Private/: Internal helpers. One function per file. Assembled into the .psm1 before the public section.

build_phases.description: New-DLabGoldenImage is implemented as six named phases. Each phase is wrapped in a DLab.OperationStep so failed runs can be diagnosed down to the exact phase.

phases.name: Plan
phases.role: Resolve OS key, ISO, paths; short-circuit if already built today.

phases.name: ApplyWIM
phases.role: Create VHDX from ISO with unattend injection.

phases.name: Boot
phases.role: Temp switch and NAT, create VM, wait for PowerShell Direct, verify internet.

phases.name: Finalize
phases.role: Teardown temp resources, compact VHDX, protect, update pointer.

guest_scripts.description: Domain Controller promotion state machine (install AD DS, promote, post-config).
DHCP server setup on the Domain Controller.
Member server static IP configuration and domain join.
Optional test OUs, users, and groups in AD.
Windows Update, disk cleanup, sysprep. For golden image creation.

config_files.description: Bundled defaults. Copied to the built module directory at build time. User overrides via %APPDATA%\DummyLab\config.psd1 or the DUMMYLAB_CONFIG environment variable.
OS definitions: WIM build numbers for ISO detection, image indexes, golden image naming, VM defaults.
config_files.iso_detection: WIM metadata (BuildNumber from 10.0.BUILD.x version string) - works with Eval, VL, and renamed ISOs

config_files.description: Windows unattend template for Server OS. Token-based, variables injected at runtime.

steps: Installer downloads the project ZIP from GitHub.
Installer runs Scripts/Build-DummyLab.ps1 to assemble the module.
Installer prints next steps (Import-Module path, DLab.ps1 usage).

build_golden_image.description: Build a sysprepped golden VHDX from an ISO.
steps: Apply WIM to a new VHDX, inject unattend, bcdboot.
Create temp VM, start, wait for PowerShell Direct.
Write pointer file so Get-DLabGoldenImage returns it as latest.

deploy_lab_dc.description: Create a new lab with its first Domain Controller.
steps: Create lab storage and state file.
Reserve DC slot, create differencing disk, register VM.
Start VM, wait for PowerShell Direct.
Persist final state; mark operation succeeded.

add_member_server.description: Add a member server to an existing lab.
steps: Create differencing disk with domain join in unattend.
Register and start VM, wait for PowerShell Direct.

teardown.description: Remove all lab resources. Operations and events survive.

add_os.description: Add support for a new server OS.
steps: Run Find-DLabISO to verify WIM build number detection.
Add entry to Scripts/Config/OS.Catalog.psd1 (BuildNumber, ImageIndex, GoldenPrefix).
Add the function name to FunctionsToExport in DummyLab.psd1.

add_guest_script.description: Add a new VM configuration script.
steps: Create Scripts/GuestScripts/YourScript.ps1 following the state-machine pattern.
Reference from the appropriate deploy helper in Scripts/src/DummyLab/Private/Deploy-Lab*.ps1.
